{{nihongo|'''Sakamoto Shrine'''|坂本神社（南魚沼市大倉）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sakamoto Shrine'''|坂本神社（南魚沼市大倉）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sakamoto Shrine'''|坂本神社（南魚沼市大倉）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sakamoto Shrine'''|坂本神社（南魚沼市大倉）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sakamoto Shrine'''|坂本神社（南魚沼市大倉）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sakamoto Shrine'''|坂本神社（南魚沼市大倉）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Sakamoto Shrine'''|坂本神社（南魚沼市大倉）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].
